Combat sport events in 2024
ONE Fight Night 25: Nicolas vs. Eersel 2
The poster for ONE Fight Night 25: Nicolas vs. Eersel 2
PromotionONE Championship
DateOctober 5, 2024 (2024-10-05)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 82: Yod-IQ vs. Dayakaev ONE Fight Night 25: Nicolas vs. Eersel 2 ONE Friday Fights 83: Panrit vs. Superball

ONE Fight Night 25: Nicolas vs. Eersel 2 was a combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on October 5, 2024, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1]

Background

[edit]

A ONE Lightweight Kickboxing World Championship rematch between current champion Alexis Nicolas and former champion (also current ONE Lightweight Muay Thai World Champion) Regian Eersel headlined the event.[2] They previously met at ONE Fight Night 21 in April 2024, where Nicolas won the title by unanimous decision.[3]

An interim ONE Women's Atomweight World Championship bout between Denice Zamboanga and Alyona Rassohyna was expected to take place at the event.[4] However in August 2024, it was announced that Zamboanga had withdrawn from the bout due to a hamstring injury and the bout was cancelled.[5]

Three fights scheduled for the card: Kongthoranee Sor.Sommai versus Tagir Khalilov, Shir Cohen versus Amy Pirnie, and Jihin Radzuan versus Ayaka Miura - were in jeopardy when Kongthoranee, Khalilov, Cohen and Radzuan all failed to give hydrated samples. Cohen/Pirnie stayed on the card at a catchweight, while the other two bouts were cancelled. Also, Banma Duoji came in at 136.25 lb and was fined a percentage went go to Danial Williams.[6]

Results

[edit]
Fight card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight Kickboxing Regian Eersel def. Alexis Nicolas (c) Decision (unanimous) 5 3:00 [a]
Lightweight Muay Thai Youssef Assouik def. Sinsamut Klinmee Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Muay Thai John Lineker def. Alexey Balyko KO (punches) 1 2:14
Strawweight Mansur Malachiev def. Bokang Masunyane Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Flyweight Muay Thai Johan Estupiñan def. Zakaria El Jamari KO (punches) 2 1:07
Catchweight (119.25 lb) Muay Thai Shir Cohen def. Amy Pirnie Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Strawweight Muay Thai Rui Botelho def. Thongpoon P.K.Saenchai Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight (136.25 lb) Danial Williams def. Banma Duoji Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the ONE Lightweight Kickboxing World Championship.

[7]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.[8]

  • Performance of the Night: John Lineker and Johan Estupiñan
